systems.system_notes: All-inside meniscal repair platform within the Smith+Nephew sports medicine portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials describe dedicated FAST-FIX delivery instrumentation for all-inside meniscal repair.

components.component_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials describe the FAST-FIX 360 delivery construct used for all-inside meniscal repair.
Official Smith+Nephew materials describe the curved FAST-FIX FLEX delivery construct.
Official sports medicine materials describe the dedicated delivery instrumentation workflow for the FAST-FIX system.
